description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The Transport Department appeals to inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys  reserve sufficient commuting time
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 運輸署呼籲跨境旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。

2024-03-31T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points or the Airport tomorrow (1st April). The Transport Department appeals to these inbound travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. It is anticipated that the demand for public transport services will be higher during the period and the waiting time for public transport services would increase. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand. The Transport Department's Emergency Transport Coordination Centre will continue to monitor the traffic and public transport service at all land-based Boundary Control Points and the Airport, and shall disseminate the latest traffic news through the Transport Department's mobile application "HKeMobility".
2024-03-31T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料明天（4月1日）將有較多跨境旅客使用陸路口岸或機場回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。 預計在返港高峰時間的公共運輸需求會較高，乘客候車時間亦會較長。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。 運輸署的緊急交通事故協調中心會繼續監察各陸路口岸及機場的交通及公共運輸服務情況，並透過運輸署流動應用程式「香港出行易」，發放最新的交通消息。

2024-04-01T12:30:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that more travellers would return to Hong Kong via land-based Boundary Control Points or the Airport starting this afternoon (1 April 2024). The TD appeals to the inbound cross-boundary travellers to plan their journeys ahead and reserve sufficient commuting time, in particular for travellers and motorists using the Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) as the Hong Kong bound traffic will be busy. On the other hand, cross-boundary coach operators, local public transport operators and HZMB shuttle bus operator etc. , have been instructed to strengthen their services to cater for the passenger demand during peak periods. The TD will closely monitor the traffic and operations of public transport services at all land-based Boundary Control Points and the Airport.
2024-04-01T12:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料今日（4月1日）下午開始將有較多旅客使用陸路口岸或機場回港，運輸署呼籲有關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，特別是使用港珠澳大橋（大橋）的旅客和駕駛者，預計往香港交通將會十分繁忙。 運輸署已指示跨境巴士服務營辦商、本地公共交通服務營辦商及大橋穿梭巴士營辦商等加強服務，以應對旅客的高峰時段。 運輸署亦會密切監察各陸路口岸及機場的交通及公共運輸服務的運作情況。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 行李處理系統機件故障

2024-04-01T06:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to baggage handling system equipment fault, In-town Check-in service at Hong Kong Station is temporarily suspended until further notice.   Passengers are advised to leave earlier for the Airport for baggage check-in.
2024-04-01T06:27:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於行李處理系統機件故障，機場快綫香港站市區預辦登機服務暫停，直至另行通告。
有關系統正進行維修。  乘客請提早前往機場辦理登機手續。

2024-04-01T06:55:00.CONTENT_EN: The baggage handling system equipment fault has been rectified. In-town Check-in service is gradually resuming.
2024-04-01T06:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 行李處理系統已完成搶修，機場快綫市區預辦登機服務逐步回復正常。

2024-04-01T07:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident, the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Tai Tong Road near Shung Ching San Tsuen.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-01T07:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，大棠路近崇正新村現已實施單線雙程行車措施。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-01T09:12:00.CONTENT_EN: The one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement which was implemented on Tai Tong Road near Shung Ching San Tsuen due to traffic accident is now cancelled.
2024-04-01T09:12:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而於大棠路近崇正新村實施的單線雙程行車措施現已取消。

2024-04-01T07:56:00.CONTENT_EN: The new traffic arrangement at Sha Tin Rural Committee Road interchange has been implemented since 24 March 2024. Except for franchised buses, all vehicles are prohibited from turning left from the first junction of Sha Tin Rural Committee Road (Shatin Station Bound) onto the Sha Tin Central Bus Terminus. Motorists should pay attention and follow the road alignment, directional signs, road markings and traffic signs of the new traffic arrangement to drive carefully avoiding driving on bus lane and opposite traffic lane.
2024-04-01T07:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 沙田鄉事會路交匯處的新交通安排已於三月二十四日正式實施。除專利巴士外，所有車輛不得由沙田鄉事會路(沙田站方向)的第一個路口左轉入沙田市中心巴士總站。駕駛人士使用新交匯處時，必須細心留意及遵照新交匯處的道路配置、方向標誌、道路標記和交通標誌指示，小心駕駛以避免跨越巴士線及對面行車線。

2024-04-01T15:22:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Lei Yue Mun Road (Mong Kok bound) near Cha Kwo Ling Road is closed to all traffic. 
Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-01T15:22:00.CONTENT_CN:
因交通意外，鯉魚門道(往旺角方向)近茶果嶺道的部份行車線現已封閉。
駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-01T15:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Lei Yue Mun Road (Mong Kok bound) near Cha Kwo Ling Road which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-04-01T15:46:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的鯉魚門道(往旺角方向)近茶果嶺道的部份行車線現已解封。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced train service during Easter Holidays

2024-04-02T06:04:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate grave sweeping activities, the MTR Bus K52A service between Tuen Mun Station and Tsang Tsui Columbarium will be enhanced on · Ching Ming Festival and the following two weekends · Frequency will be increased to about 15 to 30 minutes for most of the day
2024-04-02T06:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 為方便市民掃墓，港鐵巴士K52A路綫來往港鐵屯門站及曾咀靈灰安置所會加密班次。 ·清明節當天及隨後的兩個星期六、日 ·大部分時段加密至約15 至30 分鐘一班車

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: TD appeals to cross boundary travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 運輸署呼籲過境旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。

2024-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department anticipates that more travellers would use land-based Boundary Control Points to travel to / from the Mainland from the Ching Ming Festival tomorrow (4th April) to Sunday (7th April). The Transport Department appeals to these travellers to plan ahead their journeys and reserve sufficient commuting time. The Transport Department has instructed public transport operators to strengthen their services to meet passenger demand.
2024-04-03T18:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署預料由明天清明節假期(4月4日)起至星期日(4月7日)將有較多旅客使用陸路口岸往返內地。運輸署呼籲相關旅客預早妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間。運輸署已指示公共運輸服務營辦商加強服務應付乘客需求。

2024-04-03T18:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (both bounds) near Choi Yuen Estate are closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-04-03T18:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，寶石湖路(來回方向)近彩園邨的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-04-03T19:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (Fan Kam Road bound) near Choi Yuen Estate are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. At the same time, part of lanes of Po Shek Wu Road (Jockey Club Road Bound) near Choi Yuen Estate is still closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Individual train service has been cancelled

2024-04-03T21:15:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, High Speed Rail train G5614 travelling from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei has been cancelled due to train service regulations. Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) and app or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-04-03T21:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 內地鐵路單位通報，由於車務調度，由香港西九龍站前往深圳北的高速鐵路列車車次G5614取消。 您可在30天內於12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，或到香港西九龍站辦理退票。
